route_A_primary_simple.description: Use V018 1.18x as the whole current combat beat without extra inserts.
route_A_primary_simple.reason: Cleanest route: uses the locked current edit candidate, preserves continuity, and avoids overcomplication before full sequence pacing is known.

route_B_conservative_pacing.description: Use V018 1.12x if 1.18x feels too fast in full sequence or sound design context.
route_B_conservative_pacing.reason: Keeps the same V018 content while adding a little readability if neighboring shots are slower.

route_C_insert_experiment_later.description: Optionally test V016 lower-body / line-steal or V014-R02 energy insert in a future conform phase only.
route_C_insert_experiment_later.reason: Avoid disturbing the locked current candidate before sequence-level pacing is known.

suggested_cut_points_for_future_review.note: Planning-only estimates; do not cut media in this phase.
suggested_cut_points_for_future_review.V018_1p18x_start: Use from 0.00s unless later assembly needs pre-roll trim.
suggested_cut_points_for_future_review.V018_1p18x_end: Use near full 4.27s unless final beat feels too long.

possible_micro_trim_zones.condition: Only if the first pose feels static in sequence context.
Only if motion dies or transition requires.

suggested_cut_points_for_future_review.avoid: Do not cut through hard contact beats.

sound_design_notes_for_later: Add short cloth snap / armor jolt / foot skid / water splash on contact beats.
Keep hit-stop sound tight, not slow-motion-heavy.
Do not cover weak contact with loud sound if visual contact is unclear.
transition_notes_for_later: Enter from previous shot on motion or camera energy, not static pose.
Exit on displacement / recovery / re-entry direction.
Use V018 1.12x if nearby shots are slower and 1.18x feels too abrupt.

recommended_next_steps.option_A: Stop SHOT-02 combat generation and move to another shot.
recommended_next_steps.option_B: Later do real local edit/conform with explicit media-edit authorization.
recommended_next_steps.option_C: Later prepare Source update after more shot cycles accumulate.
